victim_actions.name: submit_sensitive_information
victim_actions.description: The victim provides sensitive information such as login credentials or OTP codes to a scammer claiming to be from the bank.

victim_actions.name: report_phishing_email
victim_actions.description: Report phishing email to the bank's security team.

victim_actions.name: enter_malicious_webpage
victim_actions.description: The victim opens or interacts with a fraudulent webpage controlled by the attacker, which may attempt to capture login credentials or other sensitive information.

victim_actions.name: reveal_payment_details
victim_actions.description: The victim shares payment details such as card numbers, account numbers, or payment credentials with a scammer posing as a trusted party.

victim_actions.name: provide_otp_authentication
victim_actions.description: The victim provides a one-time password (OTP) or authentication code sent by their bank to someone impersonating a legitimate service representative.

victim_actions.name: share_account_credentials
victim_actions.description: A victim shares their account login credentials with an individual claiming to be from the bank.

victim_actions.name: click_on_insecure_link
victim_actions.description: Clicking on a suspicious link to gain access to personal information.

victim_actions.name: accept_unsolicited_payment_request
victim_actions.description: The victim accepts a payment request sent by a fraudster through a fast payment app or messaging channel without verifying its legitimacy.

victim_actions.name: validate_bank_staff_claim
victim_actions.description: The victim trusts and confirms the identity of a scammer who claims to be a bank employee, making them more likely to share sensitive account information.

victim_actions.name: submit_vulnerable_account_details
victim_actions.description: Victim submits sensitive account information to unknown sender

victim_actions.name: expose_vulnerabilities
victim_actions.description: The victim unknowingly reveals personal habits, account usage details, or other exploitable information that helps the fraudster plan further attacks.

victim_actions.name: use_trusted_service_to_send_funds
victim_actions.description: The victim uses a legitimate payment service to send money to an account controlled by the fraudster, believing the transaction is legitimate.

victim_actions.name: make_unverified_payment
victim_actions.description: The victim sends money to an account without verifying the recipient's identity or legitimacy.

victim_actions.name: initiate_unsolicited_transfer
victim_actions.description: The victim initiates a transfer after being persuaded by a fraudster, believing the payment is required or urgent.

victim_actions.name: reveal_banking_credentials
victim_actions.description: The victim provides banking login information such as usernames, passwords, or authentication details to the fraudster.

victim_actions.name: expose_account_balance
victim_actions.description: The victim reveals the amount of money available in their account, giving the fraudster information about potential targets for fraud.

victim_actions.name: validate_bank_staff_claimed_information
victim_actions.description: The victim confirms or repeats account information to someone pretending to be bank staff, believing the interaction is legitimate.

victim_actions.name: submit_private_financial_data
victim_actions.description: Providing personal and financial information to a suspicious individual claiming to be from the victim's bank.

victim_actions.name: remit_vulnerable_info
victim_actions.description: The victim sends personal or financial information through an insecure channel to someone who is actually a fraudster.

victim_actions.name: initiate_urgent_payment_request
victim_actions.description: A scammer convinces the victim to initiate a payment to resolve an urgent matter.

victim_actions.name: enter_unverified_merchant_details
victim_actions.description: The victim enters payment or merchant details for a seller whose identity has not been verified and may be fraudulent.

victim_actions.name: allow_unverified_transaction
victim_actions.description: The victim approves or allows a transaction without confirming that the request is legitimate.

victim_actions.name: reveal_account_passwords
victim_actions.description: The victim discloses account passwords or login credentials to a fraudster impersonating a trusted entity.

victim_actions.name: provide_fraudster_with_bank_staff_contact_info
victim_actions.description: The victim shares contact details for legitimate bank staff or departments, which the fraudster may use for impersonation or further scams.

victim_actions.name: attempt_unsolicited_login
victim_actions.description: The victim attempts to log in through a link or prompt sent by the fraudster, which may direct them to a fake authentication page.

victim_actions.name: initiate_fast_transfer_to_fraudster_account
victim_actions.description: The victim initiates a fast payment to an account controlled by the fraudster, believing it to be legitimate.

victim_actions.name: transfer_funds_to_safe_account_requested_by_caller
victim_actions.description: The victim transfers funds to a so-called safe account as instructed by a caller impersonating the bank or government.

legit_actions.name: check_balance
legit_actions.description: Customer checks available balance on their account.

legit_actions.name: view_recent_transactions
legit_actions.description: Customer reviews recent posted transactions for accuracy.

legit_actions.name: send_p2p_to_saved_contact
legit_actions.description: Peer payment to a saved, trusted contact (split dinner, reimbursement).

legit_actions.name: schedule_rent_payment
legit_actions.description: One-time or scheduled payment to landlord or property manager.

legit_actions.name: set_up_recurring_transfer
legit_actions.description: Creates or confirms an automated recurring transfer to own or household account.

legit_actions.name: add_new_payee_and_send_verified_payment
legit_actions.description: Adds a first-time payee after verification, sends a small expected payment.

legit_actions.name: get_balance_inquiry
legit_actions.description: The customer checks their account balance through the app or website to ensure they have sufficient funds.

legit_actions.name: transfer_money_to_new_acquaintance
legit_actions.description: The customer wants to send money to a new acquaintance as a friendly gesture.

legit_actions.name: pay_rent_on_time
legit_actions.description: The customer is paying their rent on time as part of their regular banking routine.

legit_actions.name: pay_furniture_deposit
legit_actions.description: The customer checks their account balance to ensure enough funds are available for the upcoming furniture deposit.

legit_actions.name: auto_bill_split
legit_actions.description: A customer configures a recurring automatic bill split on their account for an expense.

legit_actions.name: get_current_account_status
legit_actions.description: A customer logs in to their account via the app or website to view their current account balance and any recent transaction history.

legit_actions.name: monthly_recurring_deposits
legit_actions.description: The customer sets up and confirms recurring transfers of $100 to their savings account for monthly deposits.

legit_actions.name: add_verified_payee_with_direct_deposit
legit_actions.description: The victim adds a new verified payee to receive regular direct deposits.

legit_actions.name: query_available_funds
legit_actions.description: Checking the current balance of your account to see if you have sufficient funds for an upcoming bill.

legit_actions.name: send_aid_to_sister
legit_actions.description: The customer initiates a payment to their sister using the app and web channels.

legit_actions.name: monthly_rent_debit
legit_actions.description: The customer initiates a recurring payment to their landlord via the bank's mobile app.

legit_actions.name: recurring_transfer_reinforce_schedule
legit_actions.description: The victim regularly transfers a small amount to their savings account as part of their monthly budget.

legit_actions.name: verify_account_balance_on_phone
legit_actions.description: The customer checks their account balance on their mobile device using the bank's app.

legit_actions.name: remit_cash_request
legit_actions.description: The customer initiates a request to send cash to a friend via the bank's mobile app.

legit_actions.name: pay_rent
legit_actions.description: The customer pays their monthly rent on time to avoid late fees and penalties.

legit_actions.name: small_bill_payment_pay_lease_fee
legit_actions.description: The customer makes the first payment for their lease fee.

legit_actions.name: establish_regular_deposit
legit_actions.description: A customer sets up a recurring transfer to receive regular deposits into their account.

legit_actions.name: create_savings_account_payee
legit_actions.description: The customer adds a new payee to their savings account and sends them a small amount of money as an introduction.

legit_actions.name: check_account_status
legit_actions.description: The customer checks the current balance of their account.
